message:
fix(codegen): Fix emit/builder ordering to prevent scrambled output

The core issue was that emit() wrote to builder.body while some modules
used getBodyDupe() to capture builder content. When code paths mixed
emit() calls with getBodyDupe() calls, output order got scrambled
(e.g., __dict__ appearing in function parameters instead of struct fields).

Changes:
- emit()/emitFmt() now flush builder before writing to output
  This ensures: builder content -> emit content ordering
- Remove problematic flush-before-statement in generateStmt
  That was capturing partial content from unrelated code paths
- Add save/restore builder state pattern to class_fields.zig
  Prevents capturing content from calling modules

Result: int_literal and longexp tests pass with correct struct generation.
